summary: Solstice Skincare - rerun May attribution with 30-day window
description: Client Amber Patel flagged window mismatch. Rerun attribution analysis using 30-day click lookback to align with client's internal reporting.

summary: Verdant Supply - compile e-commerce email open rate benchmarks H1 2026
description: Pull H1 open rate data for e-commerce vertical. Break out by device type. Deliver to Dana Schroeder by EOW. Supports Q4 benchmarking report.

summary: Lakeview Fitness - onboarding walkthrough and dashboard access setup
description: New client Jessica Morales needs onboarding walkthrough and dashboard permissions corrected after permissions reset. Assign to Priya for follow-up.

summary: Pinecrest Digital - export Klaviyo flow performance report (90 days)
description: Ben Adler needs welcome series, abandoned cart, and win-back flow data for client presentation. Formatted report with open rates, CTR, revenue attribution.

summary: Solstice Skincare - A/B test significance analysis (CTR variant)
description: Nina Johansson submitted test data: control 72/1840 clicks, variant 76/1820. Run chi-square test and deliver recommendation.

summary: Waverly Pet Supply - audit email list for hard bounces
description: Deliverability score dropped from 94 to 81. Identified 340 hard bounces from legacy import. Suppress and set up list clean cadence.

summary: Harlow Nutrition - build engaged/lapsed segments in Klaviyo
description: Set up 90-day engagement threshold segments. Engaged = opened or clicked in last 90 days. Feed into win-back campaign.

summary: Lakeview Fitness - 403 error on monthly dashboard (permissions reset)
description: System update reset Jessica Morales's seat permissions. First re-enable attempt failed. Requires ops team escalation.

summary: Verdant Supply - draft Q3 email newsletter copy (July send)
description: Seasonal newsletter. Focus on outdoor/garden category. Align with Verdant brand voice guidelines. Draft due June 30.

summary: Solstice Skincare - build summer product launch email flow
description: 3-email welcome-to-summer flow tied to new SKU launch. Flows: teaser, launch, social proof. Target: VIP segment first.

summary: Oakridge Home Goods - update landing page copy for summer promotion
description: Summer promo runs July 4-31. Update hero, subhead, and CTA copy to reflect 25% off home goods offer.

summary: Pinecrest Digital - connect GA4 event tracking to campaign UTMs
description: Map Pinecrest's GA4 conversion events to campaign UTM parameters. Validate attribution chain from email > landing page > conversion.

summary: Verdant Supply - SMS click-through tracking broken in last campaign
description: Ryan Hofer flagged. UTM parameters not appending on SMS links. Investigate and fix tracking setup in Klaviyo SMS module.

summary: Q4 2026 Benchmarking Report - full project tracking
description: Annual benchmarking report for all Crestline clients. Covers email, paid social, SEO, and content channels. Hard client deadline: November 20, 2026. Andrea is lead, Priya is support.

summary: Define benchmarking methodology and vertical taxonomy
description: Finalize which industry verticals are represented, define performance metric categories, and align with last year's methodology for YoY comparison.

summary: Client data collection - email channel benchmarks
description: Pull Q3/Q4 email performance data from all client Klaviyo accounts. Open rate, CTR, revenue per send, list growth rate.

summary: Client data collection - paid social benchmarks
description: Compile Q3/Q4 paid social performance: CPC, CTR, ROAS across Meta and Google Ads for all applicable clients.

summary: Build industry vertical comparison analysis
description: Cross-compare client performance by industry (beauty, fitness, e-commerce, home goods, food/bev). Identify outliers and best-in-class.

summary: Draft report narrative and executive summary
description: Write the benchmarking report narrative. 15-20 pages. Executive summary (2 pages). Client-facing tone. Tom to review before client delivery.

summary: Final QA review and client delivery - Nov 20 deadline
description: Tom Hadley reviews final draft. Address comments. Deliver to all clients by November 20, 2026. Pinecrest/Solstice need it by Nov 17 for internal review.

description: Validate GA4 event tracking post-migration for Meridian. Confirm ecommerce events (add_to_cart, purchase) are firing correctly.

description: Automate Looker Studio dashboards for Verdant, Solstice, Pinecrest, Lakeview, and Oakridge. Auto-refresh every Monday 6am.

description: GA4 sessions for Pinecrest landing pages showing 18% lower than GA Universal was. Likely cross-domain tracking issue. Investigate.
